title: Dictionaries for open datasets #6-#8
context: Three more open-access datasets (#6-#8, selected from the approved shortlist, not pre-approved here) are documented end-to-end to reach the cumulative adoption target. Binding guardrail: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access and identifiable data are EXCLUDED at gate-002; provenance on every assertion; the deliverable is documentation about the data, never the data itself. Each concrete dataset must carry its own committed gate-002 artifact before work starts.
objective: Produce complete, source-verified dictionaries for open datasets #6-#8, adopted upstream with acceptance evidence recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: Each dataset PASSes the gate with a committed artifact (accessTier: open, license permits derivatives, no identifiable data).
Each dictionary has 100% provenance, field coverage >= 95% (gaps listed), valid JSON + Frictionless + Croissant, validator clean, crosswalks where licensing permits.
Each adopted upstream with acceptance evidence recorded (outcomes/<dataset-id>.json) - or submitted with the blocker surfaced; per-dataset effort logged.
output: output/dict-022/ dictionaries for datasets #6-#8 plus their committed gate artifacts.
